description: This file defines negative question formation in the Past Continuous tense in Njo Viri (Balanda). Negative questions ask whether an action was not ongoing at a specific point in the past.

general_principle.statement: Past continuous negative questions preserve the progressive marker 'ti-' and form questions using either the negator 'kawilla' or the discontinuous negation 'maka … gba', followed by the sentence-final question marker 'we?'.

constraints: gba must not be used with kawilla

maka_gba_strategy.structure: Subject + maka + ti-Verb + (Object / Complement) + gba + we?
constraints: maka must appear before the ti-verb

aspect_preservation.rule: The progressive prefix 'ti-' is mandatory in all negative questions.
constraints: negation does not change aspectual meaning

word_order_rules.rule: Negative question formation does not involve inversion.
word_order_rules.note: Balanda uses sentence-final 'we?' instead of word-order change.

error_constraints: Do not change prepositions under negation

balanda: Ne kawilla tija se we?
english: Was I not eating fish?

balanda: Ni kawilla tinzü ngo we?
english: Was she not drinking water?

balanda: Danda maka titeli muru famvara gba we?
english: Were we not sleeping on the bed?

balanda: Uku kawilla tiyai we?
english: Was Uku not going?

balanda: Ngande maka tidhii ba gba we?
english: Was Ngande not coming home?

balanda: Ndi kawilla tinonö gbi difo we?
english: Were they not walking in the compound?

balanda: Ni maka tinangele zanga gba we?
english: Was she not running fast?

balanda: Uku kawilla timande gbi njü we?
english: Was Uku not working in the garden?

balanda: Wiki maka timoliki gbi difo gba we?
english: Was the child not playing in the compound?

balanda: Ne kawilla tiloro voro we?
english: Was I not watching the dog?

balanda: Ne maka tivele njo balanda gba we?
english: Was I not speaking Balanda?

balanda: Wilii kawilla tisudi kavoso we?
english: Was the girl not writing words?

balanda: Ne maka tidheke kitabu gba we?
english: Was I not reading a book?

balanda: Ni kawilla titeri ay we?
english: Was he not thinking about it?

balanda: Ndi maka tiŋiyi ay gba we?
english: Were they not knowing it?

balanda: Ne kawilla tiwe ndi we?
english: Was I not asking them?

balanda: Ngande maka tivele zi ndi gba we?
english: Was Ngande not telling them?

balanda: Wilii kawilla tikeye ti naa ni we?
english: Was the girl not calling her mother?

balanda: Ne maka timerego ŋo gba we?
english: Was I not loving you?

balanda: Ni kawilla timaguku ti kpörö we?
english: Was he not fearing the snake?

balanda: Ni maka tisogo dha gba we?
english: Was she not hating him?

balanda: Ngande kawilla tiriki ni we?
english: Was Ngande not surprising him?

balanda: Ni maka tidovee kurru gba we?
english: Was he not seeming calm?

balanda: Wilii kawilla tiyele tamma we?
english: Was the girl not tying the shoe?

balanda: Ni maka tidi kalla gba we?
english: Was he not cutting the pot?

balanda: Ne kawilla titele njokoji we?
english: Was I not pulling the door?

balanda: Danda maka tituru songo gba we?
english: Were we not pushing the box?

balanda: Wilii kawilla tisoko tamma we?
english: Was the girl not washing the shoe?

balanda: Ne maka tikuru kavokau gba we?
english: Was I not hiding the beads?

balanda: Ngande kawilla tingö tiyi we?
english: Was Ngande not building a house?

balanda: Ne maka tisuru kavoso gba we?
english: Was I not creating words?

balanda: Ni kawilla tigiri kavoso we?
english: Was she not changing the words?

balanda: Ne maka tikara njokoji gba we?
english: Was I not turning the door?

balanda: Danda kawilla titoko villi we?
english: Were we not adding money?

balanda: Ne maka tikefo Balanda gba we?
english: Was I not describing Balanda?

balanda: Ndi kawilla tikonu nvesani we?
english: Were they not helping the poor?

balanda: Ngande maka tindugu mira gba we?
english: Was Ngande not initiating the project?

balanda: Ne kawilla timaforo mira we?
english: Was I not contributing to the project?

balanda: Wilii maka tisarwa kumere gba we?
english: Was the girl not separating trash?

balanda: Danda kawilla tikiri tidina we?
english: Were we not upholding the law?

balanda: Ne maka tiduru ngo gba we?
english: Was I not wanting water?

balanda: Ni kawilla tize villi we?
english: Was she not giving money?

balanda: Ne maka tidhe villi gba we?
english: Was I not finding money?

balanda: Uku kawilla timele vongu we?
english: Was Uku not trying the cloth?

balanda: Ngande maka tisi ba gba we?
english: Was Ngande not leaving home?

balanda: Ne kawilla tilu Wau we?
english: Was I not arriving in Wau?

balanda: Ni maka tifagi mva gba we?
english: Was he not sharpening the knife?

balanda: Ngande kawilla tidewe kakpodu we?
english: Was Ngande not imitating adults?

balanda: Danda maka tibita mira gba we?
english: Were we not starting the project?

balanda: Ni kawilla titeta we?
english: Was he not falling?
